library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is required. The resolved artifact is the Git executable Maven SCM provider; its compile/runtime dependencies are declared transitively, and the reported failure is an API-change compile error in existing tests, not missing dependency, Docker service, or environment configuration.
risks: The library shells out to the local `git` executable for end-to-end provider operations; Ubuntu CI normally has Git available, but tests that execute real commits should use a temp repository and local git config rather than relying on global user settings.
Avoid network-backed Git remotes in generated tests; meaningful coverage can be reached through command-line construction, parser/consumer behavior, and temp local repositories.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8354 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.2.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
